repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.database.vector: IVFFlat and HNSW index tradeoffs, cosine vs L2 vs dot metrics, ef_search and nprobe tuning, hybrid filter plus vector, quantization, capacity planning
write a bash script to rotate logs

retrieval_query: vector database HNSW IVFFlat index cosine distance ef_search nprobe recall quantization hybrid filter capacity

validation_smoke.name: code.database.vector L3 validation smoke
signals: a recall@k benchmark against a brute-force ground truth meets the target recall threshold
the query planner uses the ANN index rather than falling back to an exact sequential scan
p99 query latency stays within budget at the chosen ef_search or nprobe setting
index build completes within the memory budget and the on-disk index size matches the estimate

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.database.vector diagnosis smoke
signals: recall@k drops sharply because ef_search or nprobe is set too low for the index's list or layer count
a metadata filter applied after ANN search returns fewer than k results because the filter is not index-aware
an IVFFlat index built before bulk loading has too few populated lists, collapsing recall
index build OOMs because HNSW graph construction exceeds the maintenance memory budget
the query uses a different distance metric than the index was built with, so results are meaningless
